title: Art critic and commentator Yamada Goro dies at age 67
summary: Known for his appearances on TV shows like 'Adomachi Tengoku' and 'Tamori Club', he was a beloved figure in Japanese pop culture.

title: Japan faces unprecedented heat wave with temperatures above 40°C
summary: Authorities issue warnings in several prefectures and record heat stroke emergencies reported, as well as cancellation of sports events.

title: iPS cell therapy for heart failure receives health insurance coverage in Japan
summary: It is the second iPS-derived product to receive approval, after the treatment for Parkinson's disease, and will cost 53.2 million yen.

title: Senate constitutional committee approves referendum law reform
summary: The bill allows the use of FM radio for campaigning and establishes mechanisms for future constitutional reform.

title: Yen falls to 163 yen per dollar, its lowest level in more than 39 years
summary: The depreciation accelerates amid monetary policy divergence and global uncertainty, while the Finance Minister warns that he will take steps if necessary.

title: Quad foreign ministers meet to strengthen security and technology cooperation
summary: The virtual meeting, the second in two months, focuses on countering Chinese influence in the Indo-Pacific.

title: Japan considers blocking access to online casino sites to protect young people
summary: An expert panel concludes that mandatory blocking would reduce minors' exposure to illegal gambling.

title: Body of 53-year-old woman found on a barge off the coast of Osaka
summary: Authorities suspect she was killed and thrown from a bridge; the case is being investigated as a homicide.

title: House fire in Yachimata leaves four dead
summary: The fire completely destroyed the house and contact with residents has not been made, so they are feared to be victims.

title: Man arrested for capturing protected butterfly on Norikura highlands
summary: The species 'Cohoumommodoki' is rare and its capture is prohibited; the suspect was reported by a witness.

title: Man arrested for murdering his 81-year-old neighbor by beating him with a metal bat
summary: The attacker confessed to hitting the victim in the head 12 to 13 times.

title: Unexploded WWII projectile discovered at construction site in Minoh
summary: The device was found during excavation work and measures were taken to prevent its detonation.

title: Pentagon estimates cost of operations against Iran will reach 6 trillion yen
summary: The Secretary of Defense testifies that the funds are needed for urgent military offensive needs.

title: Zelensky dismisses Ukrainian Chief of Staff amid protests
summary: The president relieves the military commander after days of demonstrations and differences with the former defense minister.
